prompt: A hyper-realistic cinematic photograph of a master gardener meticulously clipping a deep green garden hedge into an extremely complex, jagged, nonsensical shape. When viewed from the side, it is clear the hedge is being shaped to perfectly match the chaotic, temporary silhouette of a nearby pile of scrap metal's shadow. The scene is set in a sun-drenched formal garden. The gardener is so focused on the jagged edges of the shadow that the overall hedge is becoming structurally ruined. No text, no charts, no labels. 1024px short side.
metaphor: Gardener clipping hedge to match temporary jagged shadow. Fitting noise ruins structural truth.
